data.title: Meta Explores Stablecoins Again: Will This Time Be Different After Libra’s Failure?
data.description:
TL;DR Meta is in early talks with crypto firms to implement stablecoins for cross-border payments, especially for Instagram creators. The company has yet to officially confirm these plans, but hiring blockchain experts strengthens its commitment. Today’s more crypto-friendly environment could give Meta a second chance after the failure of Libra/Diem in 2022. The tech giant. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/meta-explores-stablecoins-again-will-this-time-be-different-after-libras-failure/

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bostic Advises Against Policy Changes Amid Uncertainty
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Bostic has stated that it is not prudent to adjust policies in the face of increasing uncertainty. His comments highlight the cautious approach the Federal Reserve is taking in response to current economic conditions.

data.title: Telegram launches NFT gift marketplace based on TON blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Telegram founder Du Rove announced on his personal channel that he has launched the Telegram Gift Market, where users can instantly buy gifts from other users or sell their own gifts. Telegram gifts are unique NFT collections based on the TON blockchain. They were initially sold for only a few dollars, but now the value of some gifts has soared to tens of thousands of dollars.

data.title: EigenLayer is about to launch a redistribution mechanism
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News EigenLayer is about to introduce a redistribution mechanism. AVS (Active Verification Service) will be able to reuse the punished funds instead of destroying them, thus unlocking new possibilities for verifiable services. This "optional upgrade" will bring a more expressive punishment mechanism and provide a better incentive structure for all participants.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,300 USDT with a 13.40% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 09, 2025, 15:29 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,300 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,300.429932 USDT, with a narrowed 13.40% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Is Ripple’s Hidden Road deal part of a SoftBank-like playbook?
data.description:
Ripple has made a slew of acquisitions to control key transaction rails and route them through XRP and its stablecoin, Ripple USD (RLUSD), drawing comparisons to Japanese investment firm SoftBank.  The $1. 25-billion acquisition of Hidden Road on April 8 allows Ripple to use RLUSD as collateral in the firm’s prime brokerage products. Hidden Road will also migrate its post-trade operations to the XRP Ledger, the blockchain that underpins cryptocurrency XRP (XRP) and several of Ripple’s institutional services
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ripple-hidden-road-softbank-playbook?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase Acquires Deribit in $2.9B Crypto Power Move
data.description:
Coinbase, one of the leading cryptocurrency exchanges in the world, has made a significant strategic move by acquiring Deribit, a prominent derivatives exchange, in a deal worth $2.9 billion. This acquisition highlights Coinbase's commitment to expanding its influence and capabilities within the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency market, as well as its aim to enhance its offerings to traders and investors. By bringing Deribit's advanced trading infrastructure and innovative products under its umbrella, Coinbase not only strengthens its position in the competitive landscape but also positions itself to capitalize on the growing demand for cryptocurrency derivatives.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/coinbase-acquires-deribit-in-29b-crypto-power-move

data.title: Federal Reserve June Rate Cut Probability Assessed
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 17.1% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in June, while the likelihood of maintaining the current rate stands at 82.9%.

data.title: US Senators urge Treasury and Justice Departments to investigate Binance's relationship with Trump
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News A group of U.S. Democratic senators (including Maryland Senator Chris Van Hollen and Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren) sent a joint letter to the Secretary of the Treasury and the Attorney General, requesting an investigation into Binance's connection with the Trump family's digital asset project. The letter pointed out that Abu Dhabi investment company MXG completed a $2 billion investment in Binance through the USD1 stablecoin controlled by the Trump family in March this year, which raised concerns about compliance risks. In 2023, Binance pleaded guilty to violating anti-money laundering regulations, and its former CEO CZ was sentenced to prison.
Senate Democrats just suspended the passage of the Stablecoin Act on May 9 on the grounds of "preventing current officials from profiting from crypto projects." The joint letter requires the Treasury Department and the Department of Justice to submit three explanations by May 21: Binance's progress in fulfilling the plea agreement, the timetable for exiting the U.S. market, and whether CZ's pardon has been discussed.
Earlier news, CZ confirmed that he had applied for Trump's pardon. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Solana's Fragmetric Protocol Surpasses $200 Million in Total Value Locked
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Solana ecosystem's liquid restaking protocol, Fragmetric, announced on X that its total value locked (TVL) has exceeded $200 million. This milestone highlights the growing interest and investment in Solana's decentralized finance (DeFi) space. Fragmetric's achievement reflects the broader trend of increasing adoption and innovation within the blockchain sector.

data.title: Backpack completed the seventh week of points distribution, and the perpetual contract holdings exceeded 189 million US dollars
data.description: According to official news, Backpack completed the seventh week of points distribution, the perpetual contract holdings exceeded 189 million US dollars, the loaned assets reached 100 million US dollars, and the 24-hour trading volume exceeded 1 billion US dollars, setting a historical record.
